title: Require Grit Helper Comments
forbids: a named predicate, function, or pattern declaration in a Grit code fence without a directly preceding non-empty // semantic comment
why: Named Grit helpers encode policy relations that are otherwise easy to mistake for parser mechanics, so each declaration must preserve its semantic decision at the point of authorship.
remediate: Add one concise non-empty // comment immediately above every named predicate, function, or pattern declaration in each Grit fence, describing the relation or decision the helper encodes.
message: Named Grit helpers require directly preceding semantic comments.
